name: devops-portfolio
description: Farhan Haroon's DevOps Portfolio — full-stack (React + Express)
author: Farhan Haroon

scripts.dev: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail --names "API,UI" --prefix-colors "cyan,magenta" "npm run dev --prefix server" "npm run dev --prefix client"
scripts.start: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail --names "API,UI" --prefix-colors "cyan,magenta" "npm start --prefix server" "npm run dev --prefix client"
scripts.install:all: npm install && npm install --prefix client && npm install --prefix server
